title: thelypteris lindleyi
intro: Thelypteris lindleyi, also known as the Indian Lady Fern or Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, particularly in India, for its various health benefits and medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris lindleyi is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
